title: Maximum AND Pair
hints: Think about building the answer bit by bit from the most significant bit.
For each bit position, check if at least 2 numbers have that bit set.
If at least 2 numbers have a bit set, that bit can be part of the maximum AND.
Once you set a bit in the answer, you can eliminate numbers that don't have that bit (set them to 0) to ensure you only consider pairs that can contribute to higher bits.
